## IProjectionChangedBroadcaster Interface

Broadcasts a signal\-only "changed" message to subscribed real\-time clients\.
Implementations: SignalR \(real\-time push\), No\-op \(disabled\)\.

```csharp
public interface IProjectionChangedBroadcaster
```
### Methods

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Projections.IProjectionChangedBroadcaster.BroadcastChangedAsync(string,string,System.Threading.CancellationToken)'></a>

## IProjectionChangedBroadcaster\.BroadcastChangedAsync\(string, string, CancellationToken\) Method

Broadcasts a projection change signal to all clients subscribed to
the group \{projectionType\}:\{tenantId\}\.

```csharp
System.Threading.Tasks.Task BroadcastChangedAsync(string projectionType, string tenantId, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken=default(System.Threading.CancellationToken));
```
